# Lorenzo Pachioli

> Front End Developer with 2+ years of experience, focused on building scalable, efficient, and accessible web applications following SOLID principles. Based in Mar del Plata, Argentina. Languages: Spanish (native), English (B2 Upper Intermediate).

## Contact
- Portfolio: https://lorenzopachioli.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/LorenzoPachioli
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lorenzo-pachioli/
- Email: lorenzopachioli@gmail.com

## Work Experience

### Smarterix - Consultora Digital (11/2025 – present)
Front End Developer at a digital consulting company in Mar del Plata, hybrid environment. Full product lifecycle: planning, implementation, maintenance and continuous improvement. Develops modern UIs, integrates third-party services and APIs, collaborates with multidisciplinary teams.
- Stack: PHP, Laravel, React, Spatie, Google Drive API, Cloudways, Digital Ocean

### SwaplyAr.com (06/2025 – 09/2025)
Front End Developer. Feature development and bug fixing across public, internal, and admin sections. Helped the Back End team with Nest.js bugs. Multicultural Latin American team.
- Stack: Next.js, Nest.js, Tailwind, Zustand, PostgreSQL

### RM Servicios Navales - Freelance (08/2023)
Designed and built a responsive landing page for a commercial ship workshop to showcase services and increase sales.
- Stack: Angular, SASS, TypeScript, Netlify

## Projects

### PawsomeMart
Mock e-commerce website with admin panel for managing products, services, promotions and orders. Functional register and login. Built without a traditional back-end using Firebase and Mercado Pago API.
- Stack: Next.js, Tailwind, Firebase, Mercado Pago API
- GitHub: https://github.com/lorenzo-pachioli/studio
- Live: https://pawsomemart.netlify.app

### Devs United
Twitter-like social network using Firebase as back-end and React Router for navigation. Built as a final evaluated project for the Acamica course.
- Stack: React, Firebase, React Router
- GitHub: https://github.com/lorenzo-pachioli/Devs_united
- Live: https://devsunited-pachioli.netlify.app

### Chat App
Real-time chat website using React and Socket.io-client, connected to a custom API built after a technical interview process.
- Stack: React, Socket.io-client
- GitHub: https://github.com/lorenzo-pachioli/Chat-app
- Live: https://pachioli-chat-app.netlify.app

### Api Chat
Back-end for Chat App, built after a technical interview to replace the provided API.
- Stack: Node.js, Express, Socket.io, MongoDB
- GitHub: https://github.com/lorenzo-pachioli/Api-chat

### Brainstorming
Scrum-based task manager built as the final project of the Lamansys bootcamp, connecting to an external API following specific requirements.
- Stack: Angular, Angular Material
- GitHub: https://github.com/lorenzo-pachioli/frontend-bootcamp
- Live: https://frontend-bootcamp-pachioli.netlify.app

### Api Brainstorming
Back-end server for the Brainstorming app.
- Stack: Node.js, Express, MongoDB
- GitHub: https://github.com/lorenzo-pachioli/api-brainstorming

### Portfolio
Personal portfolio with multilanguage support (i18n) and animations.
- Stack: Angular, TypeScript, Angular Material, i18n, GSAP
- GitHub: https://github.com/lorenzo-pachioli/portfolioAngular
- Live: https://lorenzopachioli.com

### RM Servicios Navales
Landing page for a commercial ship workshop client.
- Stack: Angular, SASS, TypeScript
- GitHub: https://github.com/lorenzo-pachioli/RMservicios-navales
- Live: https://rm-servicios-navales.netlify.app

## Education
- UTN – Técnico Universitario en Programación (2025 – present), Mar del Plata

## Courses
- Udemy: The Complete 2025 Software Testing Bootcamp (36hs — Manual, API, Performance, Automation Testing)
- Udemy: Advanced design patterns for React components
- Alkemy: Angular Skill Up (15-day group project, Scrum + GitFlow)
- Lamansys: Front End Developer Bootcamp (2 months — Angular, TypeScript, Material-UI)
- Acamica: Front End Software Developer (9 months — HTML/CSS, JavaScript, React, Firebase)

## Background
Before coding, graduated as Superior Technician in Light Mechanics with 6 years working as a commercial ships mechanic, growing from assistant to workshop manager.

## Technical Skills
HTML, CSS, SASS, JavaScript, TypeScript, React.js, Next.js, Angular, Node.js, React Native, Java, Spring Boot, PHP, Laravel, Firebase, Bootstrap, Tailwind, Material UI, Redux, NgRx, Zustand, MongoDB, MySQL, Express, Jest, WebSockets, Socket.io, GSAP, GitFlow, Scrum, Jira

## Soft Skills
Team collaboration, effective communication, problem-solving, critical thinking, adaptability, continuous learning, time management, agile teamwork (Scrum, GitFlow, Jira)
